channel.title: Llm-Inference on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Llm-Inference on Arrans github.io

item.title: Nano-Collective/nanocoder
item.description: A beautiful local-first coding agent running in your terminal - built by the community for the community ⚒

item.title: quantumaikr/quant.cpp
item.description: LLM inference with 7x longer context. Pure C, zero dependencies. Lossless KV cache compression + single-header library.

item.title: nomic-ai/gpt4all
item.description: GPT4All: Run Local LLMs on Any Device. Open-source and available for commercial use.

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference
